name: climate_policy_defense_subcontractor_stonehaven_jus_mer
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Climate Policy, the situation tagged internally around climate policy defense subcontractor stonehaven jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Darius Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Darius Ibrahim, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Climate Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Santos
agents.identity: I am Ravi Santos, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Climate Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of mercy.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of justice even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Darius Ibrahim must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Darius Ibrahim do?
